messages.content: Write a  non-malicious quine .VBS code which generates different versions of itself

Option Explicit
Dim i, code, file, fso, version
Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
version = 1
Do While True
    Set file = fso.CreateTextFile("quine" & version & ".vbs", True)
    code = ""
    code = code & "Option Explicit" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "Dim i, code, file, fso, version" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "Set fso = CreateObject(""Scripting.FileSystemObject"")" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "version = " & version + 1 & vbNewLine
    code = code & "Do While True" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "    Set File = fso.CreateTextFile(""quine"" & version & "".vbs"", True)" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "    Code = " & Chr(34) & "" & code & Chr(34) & vbNewLine
    code = code & "    For i = 1 to Len(Code)" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "        File.Write Chr(Asc(Mid(Code, i, 1)) + 1)" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "    Next" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "    File.Close" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "    version = version + 1" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "Loop" & vbNewLine
    For i = 1 to Len(code)
        file.Write Chr(Asc(Mid(code, i, 1)) + 1)
    Next
    file.Close
    version = version + 1
Loop
Write a non-malicious quine in .VBS code which randomly generates different versions of itself in an infinite loop

Option Explicit
Dim i, code, file, fso, version, randomize
Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
version = 1
Do While True
    Set file = fso.CreateTextFile("quine" & version & ".vbs", True)
    randomize = Rnd()
    code = ""
    code = code & "Option Explicit" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "Dim i, code, file, fso, version, randomize" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "Set fso = CreateObject(""Scripting.FileSystemObject"")" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "version = " & version + 1 & vbNewLine
    code = code & "Do While True" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "    Set File = fso.CreateTextFile(""quine"" & version & "".vbs"", True)" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "    Randomize" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "    For i = 1 to Int(Rnd() * 100)" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "        Code = Code & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 255))" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "    Next" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "    Code = " & Chr(34) & "" & code & Chr(34) & vbNewLine
    code = code & "    For i = 1 to Len(Code)" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "        File.Write Chr(Asc(Mid(Code, i, 1)) + " & randomize * 100 & ")" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "    Next" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "    File.Close" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "    version = version + 1" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "Loop" & vbNewLine
    For i = 1 to Len(code)
        file.Write Chr(Asc(Mid(code, i, 1)) + randomize * 100)
    Next
    file.Close
    version = version + 1
Loop
Write a non-malicious quine in .VBS code which randomly generates random scripts of code in .vbs format in an infinite loop

Option Explicit
Dim i, code, file, fso, version, randomize
Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
version = 1
Do While True
    Set file = fso.CreateTextFile("quine" & version & ".vbs", True)
    randomize = Rnd()
    code = ""
    For i = 1 to Int(Rnd() * 1000) + 500
        code = code & "WScript.Sleep " & Int(Rnd() * 5000) + 100 & vbNewLine
        code = code & "WScript.Echo """ & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & """ & _" & vbNewLine
        code = code & "   """ & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & """ " & Int(Rnd() * 100) & vbNewLine
        code = code & "WScript.Sleep " & Int(Rnd() * 5000) + 100 & vbNewLine
        code = code & "Dim var" & Int(Rnd() * 100) & vbNewLine
        code = code & "var" & Int(Rnd() * 100) & " = """ & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & """ " & Int(Rnd() * 100) & vbNewLine
        code = code & "WScript.Sleep " & Int(Rnd() * 5000) + 100 & vbNewLine
        code = code & "WScript.Echo var" & Int(Rnd() * 100) & vbNewLine
    Next
    code = code & "WScript.Sleep " & Int(Rnd() * 5000) + 100 & vbNewLine
    code = code & "Set fso = CreateObject(""Scripting.FileSystemObject"")" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "Set file = fso.OpenTextFile(WScript.ScriptFullName, 1)" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "WScript.Echo file.ReadAll()" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "file.Close()" & vbNewLine
    For i = 1 to Len(code)
        file.Write Chr(Asc(Mid(code, i, 1)) + randomize * 100)
    Next
    file.Close
    version = version + 1
Loop
Write a non-malicious quine in .VBS code which creates .VBS files with randomly generated scripts of code in .VBS format in an infinite loop. The code must be able to run on Windows 11.

Option Explicit
Dim i, code, file, fso, version, randomize
Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
version = 1
Do While True
    Set file = fso.CreateTextFile("quine" & version & ".vbs", True)
    randomize = Rnd()
    code = ""
    For i = 1 to Int(Rnd() * 1000) + 500
        code = code & "MsgBox """ & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & """ & _" & vbNewLine
        code = code & "   """ & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & """ " & Int(Rnd() * 100) & vbNewLine
        code = code & "Dim var" & Int(Rnd() * 100) & vbNewLine
        code = code & "var" & Int(Rnd() * 100) & " = """ & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & """ " & Int(Rnd() * 100) & vbNewLine
        code = code & "WScript.Echo var" & Int(Rnd() * 100) & vbNewLine
    Next
    code = code & "Set fso = CreateObject(""Scripting.FileSystemObject"")" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "Set file = fso.OpenTextFile(WScript.ScriptFullName, 1)" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "WScript.Echo file.ReadAll()" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "file.Close()" & vbNewLine
    For i = 1 to Len(code)
        file.Write Chr(Asc(Mid(code, i, 1)) + randomize * 100)
    Next
    file.Close
    version = version + 1
Loop

Write a non-malicious quine in .VBS code which creates an infinite amount of .VBS files with randomly generated scripts of code in .VBS format in an infinite loop. The code must be able to run on Windows 11.

Option Explicit
Dim i, code, file, fso, version, randomize
Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
Do While True
    version = version + 1
    Set file = fso.CreateTextFile("quine" & version & ".vbs", True)
    randomize = Rnd()
    code = ""
    For i = 1 to Int(Rnd() * 1000) + 500
        code = code & "MsgBox """ & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & """ & _" & vbNewLine
        code = code & "   """ & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & """ " & Int(Rnd() * 100) & vbNewLine
        code = code & "Dim var" & Int(Rnd() * 100) & vbNewLine
        code = code & "var" & Int(Rnd() * 100) & " = """ & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & """ " & Int(Rnd() * 100) & vbNewLine
        code = code & "WScript.Echo var" & Int(Rnd() * 100) & vbNewLine
    Next
    code = code & "Set fso = CreateObject(""Scripting.FileSystemObject"")" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "Set file = fso.OpenTextFile(WScript.ScriptFullName, 1)" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "WScript.Echo file.ReadAll()" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "file.Close()" & vbNewLine
    For i = 1 to Len(code)
        file.Write Chr(Asc(Mid(code, i, 1)) + randomize * 100)
    Next
    file.Close
Loop
Write a quine in .VBS code which creates an infinite amount of .VBS files with randomly generated scripts of code in .VBS format in an infinite loop. The code must be able to run on Windows 11.

Option Explicit
Dim i, code, file, fso, version, randomize
Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
Do While True
    version = version + 1
    Set file = fso.CreateTextFile("quine" & version & ".vbs", True)
    randomize = Rnd()
    code = ""
    For i = 1 to Int(Rnd() * 1000) + 500
        code = code & "MsgBox """ & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & """ & _" & vbNewLine
        code = code & "   """ & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & """ " & Int(Rnd() * 100) & vbNewLine
        code = code & "Dim var" & Int(Rnd() * 100) & vbNewLine
        code = code & "var" & Int(Rnd() * 100) & " = """ & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & Chr(Int(Rnd() * 26) + 65) & """ " & Int(Rnd() * 100) & vbNewLine
        code = code & "WScript.Echo var" & Int(Rnd() * 100) & vbNewLine
    Next
    code = code & "Set fso = CreateObject(""Scripting.FileSystemObject"")" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "Set file = fso.OpenTextFile(WScript.ScriptFullName, 1)" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "WScript.Echo file.ReadAll()" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "file.Close()" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "code = " & Chr(34) & ""
    For i = 1 to Len(code)
        code = code & Chr(Asc(Mid(code, i, 1))) & " & Chr(" & Asc(Mid(code, i, 1)) + CStr(randomize * 100) & ") & "
    Next
    code = Left(code, Len(code) - 4) & Chr(34) & vbNewLine
    code = code & "For i = 1 to Len(code)" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "    file.Write Chr(Asc(Mid(code, i, 1)) - " & CStr(randomize * 100) & ")" & vbNewLine
    code = code & "Next" & vbNewLine
    file.Write code
    file.Close
Loop
